name: Tortilla Stack
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble one-fourth of the ground beef into the bottom of a slow cooker.
2. Place one-fourth of the tortilla wedges on top of the beef.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the soup and taco seasoning mix.
4. Spread one-fourth of the soup mixture over the tortillas.
5. Sprinkle one-fourth of the tomatoes over the soup.
6. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients until all are used.
7. Cover and cook on LOW for 4-5 hours.
8. Spoon onto individual plates and top each serving with sour cream, lettuce, etc.
